items.localizedExplanation: inserts and formats text into segments of the video.
items.explanation: inserts and formats text into segments of the video.
items.name: The Title Editor

items.localizedExplanation: shows the start, finish and length of the video segment to which the title will be applied.
items.explanation: shows the start, finish and length of the video segment to which the title will be applied.
items.name: The Range Label

items.localizedExplanation: lists the titles you have applied to the video.
items.explanation: lists the titles you have applied to the video.
items.name: The Table View

items.localizedExplanation: adds a new title to the list.
items.explanation: adds a new title to the list.
items.name: The Add Button

items.localizedExplanation: shows the first, middle, and last video frames to which the title will be applied.
items.explanation: shows the first, middle, and last video frames to which the title will be applied.
items.name: The Frame Preview

items.localizedExplanation: selects the time range in the video to which the selected title will be applied.
items.explanation: selects the time range in the video to which the selected title will be applied.
items.name: The Range Slider

items.localizedExplanation: shows the title that will be applied. Click to edit.
items.explanation: shows the title that will be applied. Click to edit.
items.name: The Title

items.localizedExplanation: shows the subtitle that will be applied. Click to edit.
items.explanation: shows the subtitle that will be applied. Click to edit.
items.name: The Subtitle

items.localizedExplanation: positions the title text in the video frame. Click to select the desired position.
items.explanation: positions the title text in the video frame. Click to select the desired position.
items.name: The Text Placement Control

items.localizedExplanation: set the font family, style, size and color that will be applied.
items.explanation: set the font family, style, size and color that will be applied.
items.name: The Font Controls

items.localizedExplanation: opens a window that plays a preview of the selected title.
items.explanation: opens a window that plays a preview of the selected title.
items.name: The Preview button

items.localizedExplanation: discards the changes you made and quits the Title Editor.
items.explanation: discards the changes you made and quits the Title Editor.
items.name: The Cancel button

items.localizedExplanation: saves any changes you made and quits the Title Editor.
items.explanation: saves any changes you made and quits the Title Editor.
items.name: The Apply/Update button
